subcodes.first_line: Your letter, which you had addressed to the sanctified confidants of the Sanctuary of the All-Merciful, was perused with joy and delight [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مکتوبی که بحضرات محرمین کعبه رحمان مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید روح و ریحان
subcodes.subjects: @firmness in the Covenant, @praise and encouragement, @love of God
